overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a tropical beach environment. The character moves from flowering sand dunes across an open beach and into dense jungle foliage, with ancient stone ruins visible in the background throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach dunes with pink flowering succulents

events.description: character crouches to loot remains of a machine
character stands up and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: crouching to loot a defeated machine then walking through flowering sand dunes

entered.detail: tall overgrown stone tower ruin covered in vegetation
patches of pink and purple flowers covering the sand dunes
dense cluster of palm trees marking the jungle boundary

segments.scene_description: The character begins crouched over machine remains in a looting animation on a sandy dune covered with pink flowering succulents. Ancient stone ruins rise in the distance against a bright blue sky. The character stands and walks forward through the flowers toward the open beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach approaching jungle edge

events.description: character transitions from walking to running
approaching the palm tree line and jungle edge

agents.ego_description: running across the open white sand beach toward the tree line

entered.detail: expansive flat white sand beach area

segments.scene_description: The character runs across the open beach, leaving the flowering dunes behind. The ancient ruins shift to the left side of the frame while the palm tree line approaches on the right. The ground transitions from flower-covered dunes to flat compact sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded jungle edge with palm tree canopy

events.description: entering shaded area under palm tree canopy
beginning to ascend the jungle path

agents.ego_description: entering the shaded palm tree area and climbing the dirt path into the jungle

entered.detail: large green ferns and dense tropical undergrowth
narrow dirt trail winding through vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shade of the palm trees, transitioning from bright beach to dappled jungle light. The path becomes a dirt trail ascending through dense tropical ferns. The beach falls behind as the character climbs higher into the vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path with coastal overlook

events.description: descending the jungle path toward the coastal view
emerging from dense foliage to overlook the beach and ruins

agents.ego_description: moving down through dense jungle foliage toward the coastal view with ancient ruins

entered.detail: turquoise ocean water visible through the tree canopy
large ancient stone building facade on the beach

segments.scene_description: The character descends through dense jungle foliage, with large ferns surrounding the path. The view opens to reveal turquoise coastal waters and a large ancient ruin structure on the beach ahead. The character moves through the thick vegetation toward the overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, flowering coastline into the dappled shade of a dense tropical jungle. It begins with the character looting machine remains atop a sandy dune covered in pink succulents, before they stand and walk forward toward the open shore. As the character runs across the flat, compact sand, the flowering dunes recede and the ancient ruins shift to the left while a line of palm trees approaches on the right. The scene then shifts from the bright beach into the cool shade of the jungle, where the path becomes a dirt trail ascending through thick ferns. Finally, the camera descends through the dense foliage to reveal a sweeping overlook of turquoise coastal waters and a massive ancient ruin structure on the beach below.
